name: Tamaulipas (Mexico)

colors.symbolism: the field and details of the arms

description: A white field with the coat of arms of the state of Tamaulipas centred.
history: Tamaulipas has no officially adopted state flag; the design shown — a white field bearing the state coat of arms — is in de facto use to represent the state.

features.symbolism: A white field charged with the state coat of arms, in the typical pattern of Mexican state flags.
The arms reference the Sierra Madre Oriental, the Gulf coast, the cattle ranching and agricultural traditions of the state, and the indigenous heritage of the region.
